review_title: Innovative App which is great for scheduling.
description: I think this app is innovative and I can keep track of time. It also has a gps app incorporated into it which makes it ideal for Domicilliary care.
author: Fungai Nicole C.
pros: I can write documentation of what happened during my visits to the clients I work for.
cons: It can sync randomly during a visit making it difficult to use it.

description: There have been a few teething issues so far but the team have been trying to work on it to resolve. I think better technical support during the implementation stage could be helpful. We have had many issues with employees not having access to Salary Extras. All team members have been friendly during our journey so far.
author: Melissa H.
pros: I like how versatile it is with it's products and the analytics available for products. It's ideal for a one stop shop for our employees.
cons: The ATS function could probably work better and have more availability of job boards it can feed in to. I also think Salary Extras could have better discounts available, it feels they are slightly behind with what Reward Gateway and PerkBox offer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We haven't been listened to and feel our onboarding was rushed and incomplete. We were only able to focus on certain areas
author: Hannah B.
pros: We were told it would be able to do payroll and also be available in multiple languages and could be a time and attendance system that we could use to run payroll for 24/7 shifts. We were expecting a one stop shop for appraisals, reporting, stats, employee records.
cons: We aren't able to use the app efficiently or reliably. The training was incomplete and it couldn't do what we were sold in the sales pitch.

description: Disappointing. I have given many suggestions for updates, and some have been taken into consideration, but I feel I need someone to run through it and set it up properly for my team, and to stay in contact about training and using it. I realise this is an option, but it's expensive.
author: Lee-Anne S.
pros: I like that all documentation is in one place, I struggle to find anything easy about using it. Customer care is lovely, but they can't change the way it was programmed. The org chart is lovely and good to use, although it can't be printed in the way you see it.
cons: It takes a lot of training to be able to set it up and use it. It is very hard to set up Ripple and queries. There are a lot of things you can't bulk upload or bulk change. The organisation chart is great, but then you can't save it the way it looks when viewing it. The help is mainly AI, and although it has helped a lot, it can't answer specific things about your company. The Dashboard is not very flexible.

description: very disappointing. use of use is terrible. Confidentiality is compromised. it is not serving our needs and purpose.
author: Uma P.
pros: the employee details section is good. recording salary details, storing documents are good and useful. only good thing is [sensitive content hidden] (training consultant), is been very helpful and patient answering my queries, but other than him others were not up to the mark.
cons: Calendar sharing reveals the reasons of absence compromising confidentiality, signature feature is not customisable, creating templates doesn't support copy paste, which loses all formatting, Approval rules are not straight forward. need a lot of time (hours and hours) setting approval rules, and many more that makes it very hard to use. the system is not user friendly at all. recording time off in hours, you can note the hours of absence only as comments. it also took several months for finance to sort the queries with invoices. system keeps triggering emails even after completing the tasks.... so many. reports filters are not easy to figure out. it is completely a missold product. ripple function is not what it was described to be.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall our experience has been very good. It's been wonderful for logging hours and keeping track of remote employees, and also keeping records safe in one place, eliminating our paper files. We also really like being able to express thanks to each other - this works for those it works for, and those who don't like that kind of thing just don't have to think about it. It's also very helpful when arranging leave, as the company planner is really helpful too.
author: Kate L.
pros: The timesheet function is really helpful for us as none of our employees work regular hours and all have their own part-time hours. It helps us ensure that people are doing the number of hours they are contracted to do without us needing to micromanage every day.
cons: That some of the options for hours are in decimal (0.5h) and some are in minutes (0:30) which gets confusing.

description: My overall experience with Access PeopleHR has been largely positive and impactful. The platform offers a well-structured and user-friendly interface that makes daily HR tasks significantly easier to manage. From maintaining employee records to tracking absences and performance reviews, the system centralizes information in a way that saves time and reduces administrative errors. I particularly appreciate how accessible employee data is, as it streamlines reporting and improves decision-making. Another strength of Access PeopleHR is its document management feature, which allows secure storage and quick retrieval of important files. The self-service functionality also empowers employees to update their information, submit leave requests, and access documents independently, reducing the workload on HR teams. While there can occasionally be minor navigation challenges or learning curves when using more advanced features, overall the platform provides reliable performance and strong functionality. It has contributed to improving efficiency, organisation, and transparency within HR processes.
author: Julia P.
pros: PeopleHR is easy to navigate as both an admin and an employee. Their customer support is really good and you get to talk to someone quickly if the AI feature can't answer what you need to know.
cons: I wish PeopleHR had different admin levels so that different people in the HR team can have the status that they need and not full access.

description: Overall we have found the platform to be beneficial in so many ways. We have access on desktop and mobile - always able to login and deal with something no matter where you are.
author: helen F.
pros: Ease of use, reports at your fingertips. Great support in the background, you can always get the answer to an issue. Great value for money
cons: No cons for me so far. Just love everything about the platform. Still more learning to be done as the system is capable of so much more

review_title: User friendly with AI features to make life a bit easier
description: Love the software and app. I am always trying to find out its capabilities. Reports are easy to run and are useful
author: Rosie S.
pros: Easy to use and maneuver around the software. Love the new Co pilot feature to assist with tasks and the app on my phone makes booking holiday and other tasks easier to access
cons: A lot of bugs and issues sometimes that aren't the easiest to fix. The technicians need to sometimes just give you a call to get it fixed

review_title: HR is about good commuication - PeopleHR dont have this
description: When things are working well its great, when things are not its very poor. There support often takes weeks to reply about contact and finance issues and months to resolve.
author: Alex M.
pros: Its one of the most fully featured HR platforms out there, good holiday tracking with many options i have not seen elsewhere for part time or variable working patterns
cons: The back office is appalling—by this I mean finance and contract renewals. When we wanted to modify our plan, they said we couldn’t, but then were unable to provide any evidence that we were actually in a contract. Even after our contract ended, they continued to bill us and have made it virtually impossible to get the money back.

description: Overall the feedback from HR professionals managing it and, more importantly, the end users has been very good. The vast range of features can be overwhelming for a small team to begin with but with a little patience it is possible to manage a good sized company with only a couple of administrators.
author: John W.
pros: I like the ease of implementation and ongoing use for HR professionals along with the incredibly broad range of features included. Now that the product has been fully onboarded to the Access group i've found the support has improved along with the ability to be actively involved in creating feature requests for the developers.
cons: Initially, the app-based experience for the users was very mixed with frequent failures and the login experience during the transition to Access was also a little flaky. Thankfully, all of these issues are now resolved

review_title: Solid platform with some tweaks needed.
description: Its mostly a good database platform which takes care of information securely for staff across the UK and internationally. We had some issues with the link up to payroll but these have now been mostly addressed.
author: Lucy W.
pros: It is user friendly and almost all parts of the employee lifecycle are covered. We have been able to use it for about 5 years now and our experience has improved over time.
cons: Sometimes it can take a while to get issues addressed and the customer support is not always as responsive as it was initially but they seem to have improved this in the past 12 months.

review_title: Access makes HR life much easier
description: I use Access PeopleHR for managing employees, holidays, and performance. It provides seamless integration with payroll and LMS, making processes easier. However, the interface could improve to match competitors like Hibob. We switched from Workday due to headcount reduction. Setup was easy with available training sessions. I would rate it a 7 out of 10 for recommendation.
author: Sophie M.
pros: I really appreciate how Access PeopleHR makes managing employees, holidays, performance, and other relevant personnel details more seamless, which truly enhances the user experience by streamlining HR processes. I am impressed by its ability to connect with other Access products, such as payroll and the Learning Management System (LMS), which greatly simplifies the task of adding employees to different platforms, ensuring they are readily available when needed. This integration also makes assigning learning through the LMS platform straightforward and efficient, contributing significantly to a more cohesive and easy-to-manage HR infrastructure. Additionally, the setup process was fairly easy, and I benefited from the training sessions provided, which facilitated a smooth transition and quick adoption of the software.
cons: I find the interface of Access PeopleHR could be improved to match the standards of other HR competitors like HiBob.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: PeopleHR: Evolving Fast, But Becoming Pricey
description: Overall, Access PeopleHR is a capable system, great to see all the positive improvements being made, but cost and support considerations may impact its suitability for smaller organisations.
author: Julie J.
pros: We've been using PeopleHR for some time now and it's encouraging to see the considerable improvements being made to the system. The enhancements are clearly aimed at improving functionality and user experience, which is great to see.
cons: These upgrades have come with a noticeable increase in cost. As a small to medium-sized enterprise, affordability is a key factor for us, and unfortunately, the pricing may soon put the platform out of reach. While we appreciate the value of innovation, we hope PeopleHR will consider more flexible pricing options to support SMEs who still want access to a robust HR solution without compromising their budgets. Support has historically been a weak point, but I’ve seen encouraging signs of improvement in this area recently, which makes a real difference in day-to-day use.

description: Overall my experience with PHR is positive. It has decreased the issues we had in the past with annual leave and incorrect data from site management to HR/Payroll, leading to a more accurate payroll.
author: Martin H.
pros: PeopleHR is easy to navigate and set up alerts for a variety of tasks. Both employee's and managers can view and update information they need to get quick answers on most questions that an HR team would usually get via email.
cons: There are some automations I would expect the system to have that aren't there. Which leads to a bit more admin than it should.

description: I've been using PeopleHR for the last four years, and the system works very well for the company. Ripples could be made easier to use. We had some issues with the LMS part of Access, which we are still working on, but overall, the experience has been very good.
author: Melita K.
pros: Reports are completed quickly and adequately. Automated Ripple emails work well. Setting up a new employee easy to do.
cons: Setting up Ripples is confusing, especially when using it for the first time. It is not as user-friendly as it could be. Filters can be confusing as well.

description: Overall the experience is good, there have been updates and issues with the application but you always let us know and fix issues quickly. I would recommend this for small businesses managing a small team or groups of small teams.
author: Ashleigh C.
pros: The ease of holiday planning, reporting and employee management makes access people HR an ideal solution for our current needs as a small business.
cons: There are many features that do not apply and some Americanisms that can not be removed/changed/ restyled to meet our needs unfortunately. There is also a lack of easily downloading time sheets in bulk which is greatly missed.

description: my overall experience with Access PeopleHR has been positive. The platform is generally user-friendly and covers the core HR functions effectively.
author: Harvey G.
pros: how intuitive and user-friendly the system is. The interface makes it easy to manage employee records, track absences, and handle performance reviews without needing extensive training.
cons: some features felt less intuitive than others, particularly when generating customised reports. The reporting functionality can require additional time to learn, especially for more complex data needs.

description: Overall I believe that the system is user friendly both for us as system admin users and also the end user. It is easy to navigate your way around and if there is something that we need assistance with, help is always on hand in a timely manner.
author: Rebecca F.
pros: I find People HR easy to use. I only joined the HR team 1 year ago and within days I felt like I could navigate my away around the system basics very easily. I find that the customer support element is particularly good now that the AI feature has been added in, this means that help is readily available and there are only a small amount of times where I have been unable to get what I needed from the AI assistant and is has had to be escalated to a team member.
cons: It would be useful if we were able to upload emails as they are rather than having to convert them to PDF as this just delays the process. I also find that creating new reports can be a lengthy process but maybe this is just because I am self taught.

description: We have used this system for a number of years and it is user friendly for our HR Department and our staff. Easy to set up new members of staff, retains information well for leavers. We do not use all the functions as find some are not that easy to use. Overall we are satisfied.
author: Emma M.
pros: I like that you can be flexible with the way holidays are managed, such as different start months, and able to do bulk bookings, etc.
cons: Some of the reports take a little bit of effort to get right - you need to experiment/test to ensure you are getting the filters correct. The expenses process fields are not user friendly so we do not utilise this function at all. We attempted to use the login via locations, but this was so heavy on our mobiles that it used so much battery. The App also often crashes which is a shame.

review_title: feedback so far with what items I work from
description: happy, the AI is really good, no time delays and provides everything I need at the money, I also like the reports and training
author: sarah M.
pros: Easy to follow and I like the chat where you can ask training questions and get the answers straight away
cons: When first setting up program, the human interaction, I wasn't very helpful. It felt like as soon as you received the money i didn't have any support

description: Overall, it's a product that I feel is value for money, it does have limitations as it's designed for a small-medium business, but it works fine for what we need.
author: Cerys D.
pros: The planner section is great so enable managers to schedule their teams workload. I like that the people profiles help managers to manage their employees and gives them an oversight of information. The profiles are also clear and easy to use on the surface. However, the intricacies behind some of the processes can be confusing to managers.
cons: The reporting is complex and not easy to set up. I also found that there was a lack of analytics available, however, we have recently upgraded out package, so hopefully we'll see a difference. I was also disappointed with the lack of AI available, but again, with the upgrade we're hoping to see some new AI features. I have found the customer service to be wanting, I don't feel that we have always had the best support.

description: Seamless database and comms platform for employees, driving time efficiencies across the business. The reports have been especially useful, with incredible flexibility in making the system work best for us. Reports take seconds to run, compared to painful minutes with our last system.
author: Danielle H.
pros: It's functionality and ability to have everything in one place. Also, the time efficiencies within the system, moving to electronic signatures, filed in relevant places, saving employees and managers time. It has enabled us to engage our employees with a modern platform that keeps them informed of their details and has improved communication across the business. A great level of flexibility and ease of pulling reports.
cons: Time management is not as functional as we would like, with our complex rotas, however I recognise that PeopleHR is not a time management system. We have made it work for us.

description: Overall good experience however some of the reporting is a bit difficult to use. Maybe look at an easier way to create and tailor reports to suit the needs of different people.
author: Abbie J.
pros: Good value for money. User friendly and easy to use. Its good for employees to boo holidays and its useful that theres an app.
cons: The customer service. Sometimes its not very quick and it would be useful to be able to pick up the phone and speak to someone quickly.

description: PeopleHR provides an accurate employee database, which is user friendly at all levels. It provides an accurate employee database, with the ability for employees to manage their own personnel record. Customer support is easy to contact and they are fairly helpful
author: Laura V.
pros: The system is user friendly for both administrators and the end user. The reporting function is extremely helpful when specific employment information is required
cons: I am not keen on the new layout, I prefer the older layout, but this is probably just down to user preference. There are elements of the system which are unused and we should explore further
